scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @bobbykim/manguito-cms-core run build && pnpm --filter @bobbykim/manguito-cms-db run build && pnpm --filter @bobbykim/manguito-cms-api run build && pnpm --filter @bobbykim/manguito-cms-admin run build && pnpm --filter @bobbykim/manguito-cms-cli run build && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.author: Bobby Kim <bobby.sihun.kim@gmail.com>
scripts.db:test:down: docker compose stop manguito-test-db && docker compose rm -f -v manguito-test-db
scripts.db:sandbox:down: docker compose stop manguito-sandbox-db && docker compose rm -f -v manguito-sandbox-db
